name: Barbell Row
lead: Exercise for back, hind deltoids and biceps

instructions.starting position: Standing with slightly bent knees, grasping the bar with hands in pronation, grip wider than shoulder width. Bust bent forward, keep the back straight, the chest rounded.
instructions.execution: Pull the load towards your abdomen. Tighten your back at the end of the movement, shoulders and elbows back. Then slowly return to the initial position.
